news.t: Frontier Asset Management Selects SEI to Launch Active ETFs

overview.description: The Frontier Asset US Large Cap Equity ETF (FLCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of funds with exposure to large-cap US companies. The portfolio will typically comprise of 6 to 12 ETFs. FLCE was launched on Dec 19, 2024 and is issued by Frontier.
